author: doll-agent
content:
Completed sklearn LocalOutlierFactor API surface:
- Added novelty: bool field + with_novelty() builder on LocalOutlierFactor (informational; ferrolearn does not enforce sklearn's strict mode separation since predict already supports both training and new data).
- Added fit_predict(&self, x) on the unfit LocalOutlierFactor (sklearn shorthand).
- Refactored predict() to delegate to a new private compute_lof() helper so the LOF-on-new-data path is shared with the new methods.
- Added score_samples(&self, x) → -lof (higher = more inlier-like, sklearn convention).
- Added decision_function(&self, x) → threshold - lof (positive = inlier, negative = outlier).
Validated by api_proof_local_outlier_factor asserting outlier samples have lower score_samples than inliers and decision_function < 0 for the planted outliers.
